title: Bridge Essay: Nature as a potential modulator of the error-related negativity: A registered report.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Ecology/Animism** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Ecology/Animism — biophilia, nature connectedness, environmental neuroscience, neurobiophilia.
**Phase context:** Biophilia, nature connectedness, neurobiophilia, environmental neuroscience.

**Nature as a potential modulator of the error-related negativity: A registered report.** — Int J Psychophysiol (2020). DOI: 10.1016/j.ijpsycho.2020.06.014. PMID: 32610054. According to Kaplan's Theory of Attention Restoration (ART), spending time in a natural environment can restore depleted cognitive resources. If this is true, then nature exposure may modulate the error-related negativity (ERN), a component of the event-related brain potential (ERP) that is related to cognitive control and attentional allocation.
